Behind The Bar

Every bean earns its place in the grinder.

Weighed, dosed, and pulled to spec — no eyeballing it, every single cup.

Est. New Cairo
Our Story

Four shots is a number, not a compromise.

The name is literal: a quad shot is our house standard, the base every drink on the bar is built from. Inside Ena Walks Mall, the space runs on deep violets and warm light — a small, deliberate room built around the bar, not around seating for its own sake.

We roast-source in small batches, pull every shot to order, and treat the pour-over bar as seriously as the espresso machine. No shortcuts, no syrupy defaults — just coffee handled with attention.

4

Shots, always

4.4

Community rating

1

Bar, one focus
What Four Means Here

One brand, four measures.

Every cup we send out is judged against the same four pours — not marketing language, the actual standard behind the bar.

Shot One

Origin

Beans sourced and rotated with the season, never a static house blend.

Shot Two

Roast

Small-batch roasting calibrated for espresso and filter separately.

Shot Three

Craft

Every V60 timed and weighed — consistency the bar can be proud of.

Shot Four

Community

A small room in Ena Walks built for regulars, not footfall.
